headline: Is Franklin Resources (BEN) Still Attractive After A 54% One Year Share Price Climb
summary: This article examines whether Franklin Resources at around US$30.94 represents fair value or a potential mispricing opportunity, focusing on what the current stock price may or may not reflect. The stock has been relatively steady over the past week with a return of about a 0.3% decline, while posting returns of 3.7% over 30 days, 30.0% year to date and 53.6% over the past year, along with 45.4% over three years and 11.7% over five years.
